title: Doe Vulkan runtime probe
description: Per-step diagnostic artifact from bench/tools/probe_vulkan_runtime.mjs. Records how far the Doe native WebGPU stack (libwebgpu_doe.so) gets when asked to execute one WGSL kernel end-to-end (load .so, acquire adapter, acquire device, round-trip a buffer, preflight shader source, compile pipeline, dispatch compute, read back output). summary.computeDispatchBitExact tells the equivalence crosswalk whether Vulkan execution is proven bit-exact; summary.knownGap names the boundary where the probe stops working. Does not itself claim bit-exact execution — it records the current infrastructure state honestly.
